subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be My glory! The letter of his honour Samandar, upon him be My glory, hath been perused. Blessed be he and his pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی نامه جناب سمندر علیه بهائی ملاحظه شد طوبی له و لقلمه و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
